evals.prompt: Add a /status slash command that shows the last ETL run status from BigQuery
evals.expected_output: Creates a slash command handler following the existing pattern in commands/, registers it in app.ts, queries BigQuery for the latest run, and formats the result for Slack

evals.prompt: I want users to be able to react with :receipt: on a message and have the bot DM them a summary of that message
evals.expected_output: Adds a reaction_added event handler, explains the required scopes (reactions:read, im:write, channels:history), fetches the message content, and sends a DM

evals.prompt: Add a weekly digest that posts to a channel every Monday with a summary of new donors
evals.expected_output: Explains that proactive messaging needs a scheduled trigger (Cloud Scheduler or cron), not an event handler. Shows how to use chat.postMessage with a channel ID, references the report pattern from apps/runner
